paletteItems.description: The list of items available in the drag-and-drop sidebar.

id.description: Unique identifier for this palette item. Referenced in swappableWith arrays on other items.

typeId.description: Secondary identifier for this palette item, stored on nodes when dropped. Independent from id — can be used for grouping or external references.

b64Image.description: Image for this palette item. Accepts a base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,... or data:image/svg+xml;base64,...) or any other image format.

swappableWith.description: List of palette item ids this node can swap into.

hideHandles.description: When true, hides connection handles on nodes dropped from this palette item.

connectionTypes.description: Defines the visual styles and labels for different connection types.

typeId.description: The typeId of the palette item this node was created from. Used for swap matching.

b64Image.description: Image for this node. Accepts a base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,... or data:image/svg+xml;base64,...) or any other image format.

inactive.description: When true, renders the node with a grayscale filter to indicate an offline or pending state.

text.description: Editable text content for Note and Label nodes. Ignored by all other node types.

textStyle.description: Style for the body text of Note and Label nodes.

width.description: Width in pixels; only used for container nodes.

height.description: Height in pixels; only used for container nodes.

zIndex.description: Z-order for container layering; lower values render behind.

hierarchy.description: Container IDs this node is nested within, ordered outermost to innermost. Computed automatically.

connections.description: Edge UUIDs connected to this node. Computed automatically.

waypoints.description: Explicit orthogonal routing waypoints. Empty means auto-routed from handle positions.

enabled.description: When false, hides the component palette and prevents all editing interactions. Pan and zoom remain functional.

enableOnClickEvents.description: When true, node and edge click events are fired even if the general enabled property is false.

snapEnabled.description: Enable snapping to grid when moving components.

snapPixels.description: The size of the snap grid in pixels.

edgeWidth.description: The global thickness of the edge lines. Selected edges render at edgeWidth + 2.

handleCount.description: Number of connection handles on each side of the nodes (1 to 8)

style.description: Standard Perspective style object applied to the component.

hierarchy.description: Auto-computed nested tree of all areas and nodes on the canvas. Each entry contains id, typeId, label, connections, areas, and nodes.
